multi_carrier.recommendation: Multiple carrier candidates found. Run root screening against EACH carrier separately. The carrier that produces the highest root discrimination (max CV) is likely the natural carrier for this dataset. Different carriers may reveal different root architectures — this is the two-carrier finding.
